$schema: SafeReach NG Contact Data Schema v1.0
description: Schema for per-state security force contact data. Each state has its own JSON file named [state-slug].json

fields.slug: Lowercase, hyphenated state identifier e.g. 'benue'. Must match filename.
fields.last_reviewed: ISO date when this file was last reviewed for accuracy e.g. '2025-08-01'

forces.name: Full name of the unit or command
forces.type: One of: police | army | nscdc | airforce | navy | dss | amotekun | vigilante | other
forces.division: Optional — sub-unit name e.g. 'Area A Command', 'DPO Makurdi'
numbers: Array of phone numbers in local format e.g. '08066006475'
forces.is_free: Boolean — true only for confirmed airtime-free lines (112, 199, etc.)
forces.is_national: Boolean — true if this number works nationally, not just in this state
forces.source: Where this number was obtained from e.g. 'Official Twitter @BenuePoliceNG'
forces.verified: Boolean — has this number been called and confirmed active?
forces.last_updated: ISO date this specific contact was last verified e.g. '2025-08-01'
forces.notes: Optional — any important context about this contact
